summary: Frontend-only testing for OverMijPage mobile redesign, /about redirect, and existing Rebranding package features. All 10 test requirements verified and PASSED via Playwright automated tests.
passed_tests: 1. PASS: Homepage DIENSTEN section - Rebranding service card (03) visible
2. PASS: Homepage Pricing Section - 4 pricing cards visible: REBRANDING €349, BASIS €500, PRO €900, PREMIUM €1400
3. PASS: /about redirect - Navigating to /about correctly redirects to /over-mij
4. PASS: OverMijPage mobile layout (390x844) - Page loads correctly, hero section compact with centered content
5. PASS: OverMijPage mobile - CTA buttons are full-width (358px width on 390px viewport)
6. PASS: OverMijPage values section - 2x2 grid of value cards (Persoonlijk, Resultaatgericht, Betrouwbaar, Snel) visible on mobile
7. PASS: OverMijPage timeline - 3 stacked timeline cards (Achtergrond, Passie, Yrvante) display properly without side labels
8. PASS: OverMijPage pricing comparison - Bureau €3.000+ vs Yrvante Vanaf €349 shows correctly
9. PASS: OverMijPage dark mode - All text is WHITE on dark background (rgb(255, 255, 255))
10. PASS: OverMijPage light mode - Headline text is BLACK (rgb(0, 0, 0))
11. PASS: PackagesPage (/pakketten) - Rebranding Pakket €349 visible as FIRST card with Before/After demo component
12. PASS: Dark mode toggle - Theme toggle persists across page navigation
critical_code_review_comments: OverMijPage mobile-first design implemented correctly with responsive breakpoints (sm:, lg:)
2x2 grid for values section uses grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for proper mobile layout
Timeline cards are stacked vertically with space-y-4 sm:space-y-6 for mobile
/about redirect uses React Router Navigate component with replace prop
Dark mode implementation uses Tailwind's dark: class variants correctly
CTA buttons use w-full sm:w-auto for full-width on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18: OverMijPage mobile redesign and /about redirect testing complete. (1) OverMijPage has mobile-first design with compact hero, 2x2 values grid, stacked timeline cards. (2) /about redirects to /over-mij via React Router Navigate. (3) Dark mode toggle works via data-testid='theme-toggle'. (4) Light mode: text is BLACK (rgb(0,0,0)), Dark mode: text is WHITE (rgb(255,255,255)). (5) Rebranding package €349 appears as FIRST card in homepage pricing section and PackagesPage.
